title: Fqsen constructor rejects some valid root-namespace forms
body: The regex in Fqsen::__construct only special-cases the literal string '\\' for the global namespace; other root-only fqsens produced by upstream tooling throw InvalidArgumentException even though they represent a valid (if unusual) fully qualified name.

title: ProjectFactory interface has no reference implementation
body: ProjectFactory just declares `create(string $name, array $files): Project` with no shipped implementation or example in this package. Since ReflectionCommon is a low-level dependency for phpDocumentor, could a minimal example implementation be added to the docs showing how File[] is expected to map to a Project?

title: Relationship between Element, File, and Project isn't documented
body: It's not clear from the interfaces alone whether a Project is expected to own its File objects, or whether Element instances reference File independently. A short architecture note would help consumers implementing their own Project/File.

title: Location lacks a usage example for line/column tracking
body: src/Location.php exposes line/column info but there's no example showing how a parser is expected to populate it (0-indexed vs 1-indexed columns in particular), which led to an off-by-one in our downstream error reporting.
